mainEntity.name: When does workers' comp cover surgery for slip and fall in Cottonwood Heights?
mainEntity.text: When does workers' comp cover surgery for slip and fall in Cottonwood Heights?

acceptedAnswer.text: Utah comp covers surgery for work slip if causally related approved by authorized doctors and not denied on reasonableness grounds.[3][7]

suggestedAnswer.text: Pre-approval often required. Second opinions common. Delays hurt recovery. Attorney advocates against insurer denials. Post-op rehab included. Local Murray surgeons coordinate with comp.[3][7]

name: Surgery Approval for Work Slip in Cottonwood Heights
description: Utah comp covers surgery for work slip if causally related approved by authorized doctors and not denied on reasonableness grounds.[3][7]
